mapper.select:
SELECT job_id, system_code, measure_code FROM spc_point_metadata WHERE 1=1
and FAC_CODE = #{facCode}
and
(system_code = #{condition.systemCode} AND measure_code = #{condition.measure_code})
SELECT id FROM spc_point_metadata WHERE deleted_id = 0 AND enable_realtime_alarm = 1 ORDER BY id
SELECT * FROM spc_point_metadata WHERE deleted_id = 0 AND enable_realtime_alarm = 1 ORDER BY id
SELECT * FROM spc_point_metadata WHERE deleted_id = 0 ORDER BY id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO spc_point_metadata ( job_id, indicator_name, class_code, system_code, indicator_level, measure_code, measure_name, unit, area_code, fac_code, data_type, precision_decimal, range_min, range_max, y_axis_min, y_axis_max,y_axis_step, enable_realtime_alarm, enable_offline_chart, target_value, ucl_value, lcl_value, uwl_value, lwl_value, usl_value, lsl_value,u3l_value,l3l_value, equipment_id, equipment_name, ocap_template_id, attributes, updated_by, config_type, enabled_spc_controlled, created_by, is_default ) VALUES ( #{jobId}, #{indicatorName}, #{classCode}, #{systemCode}, #{indicatorLevel}, #{measureCode}, #{measureName}, #{pointUnit}, #{areaCode}, #{facCode}, #{dataType}, #{precisionDecimal}, #{rangeMin}, #{rangeMax}, #{yAxisMin}, #{yAxisMax},#{yAxisStep}, #{enableRealtimeAlarm}, #{enableOfflineChart}, #{targetValue}, #{uclValue}, #{lclValue}, #{uwlValue}, #{lwlValue}, #{uslValue}, #{lslValue}, #{u3lValue}, #{l3lValue}, #{equipmentId}, #{equipmentName}, #{ocapTemplateId}, #{attributes}, #{updatedBy}, #{configType}, #{enabledSpcControlled}, #{createdBy}, #{isDefault} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE spc_point_metadata
measure_code = #{measureCode}, measure_name = #{measureCode}, job_id = #{jobId}, indicator_name = #{indicatorName}, indicator_level = #{indicatorLevel}, class_code = #{classCode}, area_code = #{areaCode}, system_code = #{systemCode}, unit = #{pointUnit}, data_type = #{dataType}, precision_decimal = #{precisionDecimal}, range_min = #{rangeMin}, range_max = #{rangeMax}, y_axis_min = #{yAxisMin}, y_axis_max = #{yAxisMax}, y_axis_step = #{yAxisStep}, enable_realtime_alarm = #{enableRealtimeAlarm}, enable_offline_chart = #{enableOfflineChart}, target_value = #{targetValue}, ucl_value = #{uclValue}, lcl_value = #{lclValue}, uwl_value = #{uwlValue}, lwl_value = #{lwlValue}, usl_value = #{uslValue}, lsl_value = #{lslValue}, u3l_value = #{u3lValue}, l3l_value = #{l3lValue}, equipment_id = #{equipmentId}, equipment_name = #{equipmentName}, ocap_template_id = #{ocapTemplateId}, enabled_spc_controlled = #{enabledSpcControlled}, deleted_id = #{deletedId}, attributes = #{attributes}, created_by = #{createdBy}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, fac_code = #{facCode}, config_type = #{configType}, is_default = #{isDefault}, updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_id = 0
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM spc_point_metadata WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_id = 0
SELECT * FROM spc_point_metadata WHERE job_id = #{jobId} AND deleted_id = 0 ORDER BY id
SELECT * FROM spc_point_metadata WHERE measure_code = #{measureCode} and deleted_id = 0 ORDER BY id
SELECT * FROM spc_point_metadata WHERE indicator_name = #{indicatorName} AND deleted_id = 0 LIMIT 1
